expo.name: OlCha
expo.description: OlCha — Yagona AI-powered ijtimoiy platforma. Postlar, Reels, Stories, Xabarlar, Jamoalar va ko'proq — barchasi bitta joyda.

infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: OlCha kamera orqali foto va video olish uchun ruxsat so'raydi
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: OlCha mikrofon orqali video yozib olish uchun ruxsat so'raydi
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: OlCha galereyangizdan rasm va video tanlash uchun ruxsat so'raydi
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: OlCha rasmlarni galereyangizga saqlash uchun ruxsat so'raydi
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: OlCha joylashuvingizni post bilan ulashish uchun ruxsat so'raydi
infoPlist.NSFaceIDUsageDescription: OlCha Face ID orqali tezkor kirish uchun ruxsat so'raydi
